---
title: "visualization"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(DBI)
library(dbplyr)
library(duckdb)
library(showtext)
```

## Connect to database
```{r}
conn <- DBI::dbConnect(duckdb::duckdb(),
                       dbdir = "mycorrhizal.db")

DBI::dbListTables(conn)
```

## Reference tables
```{r}
species_occurrences_db <- tbl(conn, "species_occurrences")
species_occurrences_db

plants_db <- tbl(conn, "plants")
plants_db

sites_db <- tbl(conn, "sites")
sites_db
```

## Query
```{r}
result <- sites_db %>% 
  inner_join(plants_db, by = "site_id") %>% 
  inner_join(species_occurrences_db,by = "plant_id") %>% 
  filter(present == 1) %>% 
  group_by(site_description) %>% 
  summarize(diversity = n_distinct(mycorrhiza_species)) %>% 
  arrange(desc(diversity)) %>% 
  collect()
```

## Visualize results
```{r}
# Graphics
font_add_google(name = "Sarala", family = "sarala")
site_colors <- c("Urban desert preserve" = "#5d634a", "Sonoran desert" = "#96882b")

showtext_auto(enable = TRUE)

result %>% 
  mutate(region = ifelse(site_description %in% c("South Mountain Park", "North Mountain Preserve"), "Urban desert preserve", "Sonoran desert")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=reorder(site_description, diversity), y=diversity, fill = region)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = site_colors,
                    name = NULL) +
  labs(
    x = "Site",
    y = "Mycorrhizal species diversity",
    title = "Mycorrhizal species diversity is higher in the Sonoran\ndesert than in surrounding urban desert preserves",
    subtitle = "Decreases in Mycorrhizal diversity observed in woody and succulent plants\nat urban preserves may reduce the ability of preserves to sustain biodiversity\nin central Arizona."
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 8, family = "sarala"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14.5, family = "sarala"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, "sarala"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 9, family = "sarala"))
```

## Close connection
```{r}
DBI::dbDisconnect(conn, shutdown = TRUE)
```

```{r}
writeLines(capture.output(sessionInfo()), "requirements.txt")
```
